description.en: Attacks an enemy. After attacking, if the enemy has no <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color>, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>. If the enemy has a <color=#28d9ed>buff</color>, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다. 공격 후 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>가 없다면 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 증가시킵니다. <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 보유하고 있다면 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、対象に<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>がない場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>UPさせる。対象に<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>がある場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。攻击后,若目标没有<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,则使自身的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。若附带<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,则有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) When an enemy uses a <color=#28d9ed>non-attack skill</color>, activates <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color>.\nGrants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack and Defense</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 적이 <color=#28d9ed>공격이 아닌 스킬</color> 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.\n아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력과 방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시키고, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)敵が<color=#28d9ed>攻撃以外のスキル</color>を使用時、<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>を発動する。\n【迅速対応】:味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力と防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせ、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: (触发效果)敌人使用<color=#28d9ed>非攻击类技能</color>时,触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>效果。\n使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力和防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> on all targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상 모두에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象全体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对所有目标造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Increases Attack by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.\nWhen using <color=#28d9ed>Bursting Patriotism</color>, reduces Ultimate Skill cooldown of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 자신의 턴마다 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>애국심 대폭발</color> 사용 시, 아군 전체의 필살기 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)自分のターンが来るたびに、攻撃力が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。\n<color=#28d9ed>【愛国心大爆発】</color>使用時、味方全体の必殺スキルのターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
description.zh: (被动效果)每到自身回合时,使攻击力提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。\n使用<color=#28d9ed>爱国心大爆发</color>时,使全体友军的必杀技冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
